_doc: See docs/adr/0001-roles-and-approval-design.md before adding/renaming roles. Roles drive permission gates; approval routing lives in a separate per-employee chain (lands with leave module). Do NOT invent a parallel approval system here.
name: SUPER_ADMIN
description: Bypasses all permission checks via system_admin flag. Reserved for ops/infra.

name: HR_ADMIN
description: HR back office. Manages users, sees roles + permissions, manages time entries and work schedules for any employee.

name: OPERATIONS_MANAGER
description: Bridges HR Admin and Project Management. Read access to people and roles for staffing and capacity visibility. Approval-chain placement determines whether they're an approver for a specific request (see ADR 0001).

name: PROJECT_MANAGER
description: 2nd-level approver in employee leave chains. Authority over a specific request requires being on that employee's approval chain (see ADR 0001). Permissions limited to APPROVAL:View in v0; LEAVE:* codes land with the leave module.

name: TECHNICAL_DIRECTOR
description: 1st-level approver in employee leave chains. Same permission set as PROJECT_MANAGER; the PM/TD distinction lives in the approval chain step, not in role permissions. See ADR 0001.

name: EMPLOYEE
description: Default role for new registrations. Self-service routes only.
